certified_capabilities: Replay-derived Resource Selection-routed intent is converted into PPP-compatible input.
PPP receives a source-agnostic input contract.
Replay lineage, confidence, domain references, chain continuity, and resource requirement references are preserved.
Replay reconstruction verifies artifact ordering and hash integrity.
Routing fails closed on source visibility leak, lineage mismatch, hash mismatch, chain break, and replay collision.
